name: ETHGlobal
notes: Requires full Chrome UA. Extract href='/events/<slug>' pattern. HTTP-check each slug — returns 500 for non-existent slugs.

name: DoraHacks
notes: Open API but intermittent auth walls. Key fields: title, start_time, end_time, online, prize_pool, url.

name: Major League Hacking
notes: Cloudflare WAF blocks headless requests. Try with full Chrome UA + cookies. Falls back to manual curation.

name: Devfolio
notes: API returns up to 2 pages. Response shape: { result, count, pages }. Fields: name, starts_at, ends_at, slug, is_online. Event URL: https://devfolio.co/<slug>.

name: Devpost
notes: Devpost ToS prohibits automated API access. HTML scraping of the public listing page is borderline — proceed carefully and rate-limit. Best used for manual curation.

name: Unstop
notes: Pan-India platform. HTML listing page returns 200. Extract event cards from page source.

name: HackerEarth
notes: Has a semi-public JSON API for hackathon listings. Fields: title, start_utc, end_utc, url.

name: lablab.ai
notes: AI-focused hackathon platform. Returns 403 to non-browser clients — requires full browser UA and Cloudflare cookie bypass.

name: Hackathon.com
notes: Aggregator with listing of online hackathons. HTML page is scrapeable. Look for event titles, dates, and links.

name: AngelHack
notes: Runs global hackathons. HTML listing page. Look for JSON-LD structured data or visible date strings.

name: Junction
notes: Europe's largest hackathon organiser (Helsinki). Single annual event — check homepage for dates.

name: Encode Club
notes: Web3 education + hackathon platform. Partners with major chains (Solana, Ethereum, Polkadot).

name: Gitcoin
notes: Open API. Fields: name, start_date, end_date, url, total_prizes. Focused on Web3/open source.

name: Kaggle
notes: ML competitions, not traditional hackathons. Requires Kaggle API key in Authorization header. Only include if explicitly looking for ML challenges.

name: Hugging Face
notes: AI/ML focused. Events page lists sprints and hackathons. Look for JSON-LD or visible date strings.

name: Chainlink
notes: Oracle-focused Web3 hackathon. Annual event. Check homepage for current edition dates.

name: NASA Space Apps Challenge
notes: Annual event, ~October. Check spaceappschallenge.org/2026/ for current year. The homepage URL is acceptable since the whole site is the event.

name: HackMIT
notes: Annual MIT hackathon, ~September. Homepage IS the event page. Look for year and dates in page title/hero.

name: TreeHacks (Stanford)
notes: Stanford's annual hackathon, ~February. Homepage is the event page.

name: CalHacks (UC Berkeley)
notes: UC Berkeley's hackathon, ~October. Homepage is the event page.

name: PennApps
notes: UPenn hackathon, ~September. One of the oldest collegiate hackathons.

name: MHacks (UMich)
notes: University of Michigan hackathon, ~October.

name: HackPrinceton
notes: Princeton hackathon, bi-annual (spring + fall).

name: HackNY
notes: NYC collegiate hackathon. Annual event.

name: HackDuke
notes: Duke University hackathon focused on social good. Annual, ~October.

name: SBHacks (UCSB)
notes: UC Santa Barbara hackathon. Annual event, ~January.

name: HackUMass
notes: UMass Amherst hackathon. Annual, ~October.

name: Climate Launchpad
notes: World's largest green business ideas competition. Annual. Good for climate-track hackathons.

name: Solana Foundation Hackathons
notes: Solana ecosystem hackathons (Grizzlython, Hyperdrive, etc). Check the page for current event.
